testcase.name: test_put_slider_slides_persists_and_syncs

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 2 slides after filter, got 3: [{'desktop': 'https://example.com/a-desk.jpg', 'mobile': 'https://example.com/a-mob.jpg'}, {'desktop': 'https://example.com/c-desk.jpg', 'mobile': ''}, {'desktop': '', 'mobile': ''}] assert 3 == 2 + where 3 = len([{'desktop': 'https://example.com/a-desk.jpg', 'mobile': 'https://example.com/a-mob.jpg'}, {'desktop': 'https://example.com/c-desk.jpg', 'mobile': ''}, {'desktop': '', 'mobile': ''}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_slider_slides_mobile.py:92: in test_put_slider_slides_persists_and_syncs assert len(slides) == 2, f"expected 2 slides after filter, got {len(slides)}: {slides}" E AssertionError: expected 2 slides after filter, got 3: [{'desktop': 'https://example.com/a-desk.jpg', 'mobile': 'https://example.com/a-mob.jpg'}, {'desktop': 'https://example.com/c-desk.jpg', 'mobile': ''}, {'desktop': '', 'mobile': ''}] E assert 3 == 2 E + where 3 = len([{'desktop': 'https://example.com/a-desk.jpg', 'mobile': 'https://example.com/a-mob.jpg'}, {'desktop': 'https://example.com/c-desk.jpg', 'mobile': ''}, {'desktop': '', 'mobile': ''}])
